campaigns.headline: Your kind of service. Your kind of people.
campaigns.body: Thousands of travelers like you chose LUXY this week. See what they're saying.

campaigns.headline: 847 Fortune 500 execs ride with us daily
campaigns.body: Trusted by professionals who value consistency. 99.7% on-time. No surprises.

campaigns.headline: Welcome back. Your driver remembers your preferences.
campaigns.body: Temperature, music, route — saved from your last ride. That's what 'premium' actually means.

campaigns.headline: Your colleagues trust us. Now it's your turn.
campaigns.body: Join 50,000+ executives who switched from rideshare chaos. One tap booking, familiar faces, zero friction.

campaigns.headline: Ready when you are
campaigns.body: Tap. Book. Relax. Your usual driver. Your usual route. Your usual comfort.

campaigns.headline: Plan your week. Including the ride.
campaigns.body: Professionals who plan ahead choose LUXY. Schedule your week's rides in 2 minutes on Sunday night.

campaigns.headline: Tuesday 6am flight? Book your 4:15am pickup now.
campaigns.body: Your driver confirmed. Route optimized. ETA locked in. One less thing to coordinate.

campaigns.headline: Your calendar. Your rides. Synced.
campaigns.body: Connect your calendar — LUXY auto-suggests rides for your travel days. Confirm with one tap.

campaigns.headline: Tomorrow's ride is ready. Are you?
campaigns.body: Flight SFO→JFK confirmed. LUXY pickup scheduled 4:15am. Driver assigned. All set.

campaigns.headline: Your Q2 travel, sorted in 3 minutes
campaigns.body: Upload your travel schedule. We'll pre-book every ride. Modify anytime. Zero stress.

campaigns.headline: I swore I'd never use a car service again
campaigns.body: Sarah, a Fortune 500 exec, faced the same dilemma after multiple disappointing rides. The fear of unprofessionalism.

campaigns.headline: We've All Heard The Horror Stories
campaigns.body: Late pickups. Rude drivers. Hidden fees. 847 Fortune 500 CEOs still choose us daily. Here's the data they see.

campaigns.headline: 47,000 executives trust LUXY with their reputation
campaigns.body: Independent audit: 99.7% on-time arrival rate. DOT safety rating: Superior. Average driver tenure: 8.2 years.

campaigns.headline: 847,000+ rides completed. Zero security incidents.
campaigns.body: Background-checked drivers, live GPS tracking, 24/7 support team. We earned our trust.

campaigns.headline: What if your next ride changed how you travel forever?
campaigns.body: Forget everything you know about car services. LUXY is something different entirely.

campaigns.headline: The city looks different from the back of a LUXY
campaigns.body: Noise-cancelling cabin. Panoramic views. Your own mobile office. This isn't transportation — it's transformation.

campaigns.headline: You haven't experienced New York until you've experienced it from here
campaigns.body: Curated routes. Hidden gems. Your driver knows the city's secrets. Every ride is a discovery.

campaigns.headline: Your next adventure starts curbside
campaigns.body: First-time LUXY riders get a complimentary route upgrade. See the city the way locals wish they could.

campaigns.headline: What's your backup plan when rideshare fails?
campaigns.body: Every week, 23% of airport rideshare pickups are delayed 15+ minutes. Professionals plan ahead.

campaigns.headline: DOT Safety Rating: Superior. Insurance: $10M.
campaigns.body: Background-checked drivers (FBI + state). Live GPS tracking. 24/7 dispatch. Real-time ETAs to your assistant.

campaigns.headline: Your flight lands at 11pm. Who's meeting you?
campaigns.body: LUXY monitors your flight in real-time. Delay? We adjust. Cancel? Full refund. Your driver is there when you land.

campaigns.headline: Never worry about ground transportation again
campaigns.body: Guaranteed pickup. Flight monitoring. Trip insurance included. Fixed pricing — no surge, no surprises.

campaigns.headline: Reliable transportation for people who plan ahead
campaigns.body: 99.7% on-time. Fixed pricing. Background-checked drivers. 8.2 years average driver tenure. The facts speak.

campaigns.headline: Your standards deserve a service that keeps them
campaigns.body: Real-time flight monitoring. Automatic delay adjustment. Written pickup guarantee. Zero ambiguity.

campaigns.headline: Consistent service. Every single ride.
campaigns.body: Same standards. Same professionalism. Same peace of mind. Whether it's your first ride or your hundredth.

campaigns.headline: 50,000 professionals switched this year. Here's why.
campaigns.body: Real reviews from real riders. See what professionals like you say about making the switch from rideshare.

campaigns.headline: 'I wish I'd switched sooner' — David M., CFO
campaigns.body: Join thousands of professionals who upgraded their commute. 4.9/5 average rating across 847,000 rides.

campaigns.headline: Your colleagues already know
campaigns.body: 87% of LUXY riders were referred by another professional. The people you trust, trust us.
